questions.question: Explain the concept of regularization techniques such as L1 and L2 regularization in the context of Linear Regression. Provide an example of when each would be used.
Compare and contrast the advantages and disadvantages of using Gradient Descent vs. Stochastic Gradient Descent for training Linear Regression models.
Given a Linear Regression model with the equation y = w0 + w1*x + ε, describe how to update the weights (w0 and w1) using the Gradient Descent algorithm to minimize the cost function.
